---
title: "Copy and Paste"
---

## Purpose

This section is the attendee-facing shortcut library. The raw source files live in `attendee-assets/` so the website can stay aligned with the lab files.

## Starter Snippets

- `attendee-assets/agent-instructions/first-agent.md`
- `attendee-assets/agent-instructions/file-grounding.md`
- `attendee-assets/prompts/brainstorming-prompts.md`
- `attendee-assets/channels/publish-checklist.md`

## Authoring Rule

Whenever we add a new snippet for class, we should add it to `attendee-assets/` first and then surface it here.
